title: Count Negative Cells in Sorted Matrix
hints: Since rows and columns are sorted, negatives cluster in the bottom-right corner. Can you locate the boundary between non-negative and negative numbers efficiently?
Start at the top-right corner. If the current value is negative, all values below it in that column are also negative. If positive, move left.
Traverse from top-right to bottom-left. Move down when you find a negative (counting the rest of the column) or left when you find a non-negative.
